blocks.content: They stayed another hour. Then Eli's mom's minivan. Eli in front because he'd called it, Savannah and Marcus in the back, Kit and Daisy in the middle row with a gap between them that nobody acknowledged.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I want everyone to know that after the line dance situation, the DJ pulled it together. I've revised my assessment.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: You had beef with the DJ all night.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I had concerns. They were valid. He addressed them.
Kit looked out the window. Millhaven at night, the streetlights going by.
The radio was low. Savannah said something kind about Brooke and Ryan. Eli agreed. Nobody looked at Kit and Daisy.
At her walk, everyone said goodnight. Daisy climbed out, turned back.
Then she looked at Kit. Half a second longer than the rest.
She went inside. He watched the porch light come on and said nothing for the rest of the ride home.
